title: Agency Mortgage-Backed Securities - Federal Reserve Bank of New York

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This is a navigation/container page from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York providing links to agency MBS operations data, SOMA holdings, transaction data, and related resources. No substantive content, data, or analysis is contained in this page body itself.
key_points: New York Fed is authorized by FOMC to buy/sell agency MBS for the System Open Market Account (SOMA)
Dollar roll and coupon swap transactions may be executed to facilitate settlement of MBS purchases
Transactions are executed with primary dealers
Agency MBS purchases began in early 2009 and have continued under multiple FOMC directives since end of 2008
SOMA portfolio also includes Treasury securities, agency debt securities, and agency commercial mortgage-backed securities
Transaction data is published quarterly, approximately two years after transactions occur, per Dodd-Frank Act
market_structure_context: This page describes the institutional structure of Fed MBS operations but provides no substantive data, analysis, or actionable insights. It is an index page only. Actual research should source data from the linked Agency MBS Operations, SOMA Holdings, or Transaction Data resources.
